title: cepobaculum capra
intro: Cepobaculum capra is a type of flowering plant commonly known as Goat's Beard, although it is not related to the goat's beard plant (Aruncus dioicus). The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its roots and leaves. The medicinal properties of Cepobaculum capra include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Cepobaculum capra, such as decoctions and infusions, are used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin conditions like eczema.
